name: ac-synthetics-demo-apr26
description: Elastic Synthetics project to extract and validate TLS server certificate fingerprints (SHA-256 primary, SHA-1 optional) across multiple real-world scenarios

scripts.test:ci: npm run test:dry && npm run test:unit
scripts.push: npm run generate:tls-targets && elastic-synthetics push --config synthetics.config.ts
scripts.push:staging: npm run generate:tls-targets && elastic-synthetics push --config synthetics.config.ts --space staging
